2603.20292.title: HSI Image Enhancement Classification Based on Knowledge Distillation: A Study on Forgetting
2603.20292.paper_summary: In incremental classification tasks for hyperspectral images, catastrophic forgetting is an unavoidable challenge. While memory recall methods can mitigate this issue, they heavily rely on samples from old categories. This paper proposes a teacher-based knowledge retention method for incremental image classification. It alleviates model forgetting of old category samples by utilizing incremental category samples, without depending on old category samples. Additionally, this paper introduces a mask-based partial category knowledge distillation algorithm. By decoupling knowledge distillation, this approach filters out potentially misleading information that could misguide the student model, thereby enhancing overall accuracy. Comparative and ablation experiments demonstrate the proposed method's robust performance.
2603.20292.paper_summary_zh: 在高光譜影像的增量分類任務中，災難性遺忘是一個無法避免的挑戰。雖然記憶回憶方法可以減輕這個問題，但它們在很大程度上依賴於舊類別的樣本。本文提出了一種基於教師的知識保留方法，用於增量影像分類。它通過利用增量類別樣本來減輕模型對舊類別樣本的遺忘，而不依賴於舊類別樣本。此外，本文還介紹了一種基於掩碼的部分類別知識蒸餾算法。通過解耦知識蒸餾，這種方法過濾掉可能誤導學生模型的潛在誤導信息，從而提高整體準確性。比較和消融實驗證明了所提出方法的穩健性能。
2603.20292.author: Songfeng Zhu et.al.
